reasoning: The order's internal comments history contains a high-priority fraud alert. The customer, Lisa Anderson, has a 90% refund rate with 16 refunds in the last 33 days, totaling nearly $1,000. Per the explicit internal instruction to not process further refunds and escalate to Loss Prevention, I am denying this request.
